Exposure Management

Continuously discover. Prioritize intelligently. Validate continuously. Remediate with confidence. Reduce cyber risk — continuously.

CTEM at a Glance

A continuous,
risk-based approach to
Cyber Resilience

CTEM helps organizations manage cyber exposures across the entire attack surface and dramatically reduce the likelihood and impact of cyber incidents.

  • Complete visibility of exposures
  • Risk prioritized by business impact
  • Continuous validation of real-world risk
  • Faster remediation with measurable outcomes
  • Executive reporting in business terms
Why CTEM, Why Now?

The threat landscape has
changed

Attack Surface Explosion

Digital transformation and cloud adoption are expanding exposures rapidly.

Breach Economics

The average global cost of a data breach is USD 4.88M (IBM 2025).

Ineffective Controls

~60% of breaches involve known vulnerabilities or misconfigurations.

Board-Level Expectations

Regulators and boards demand continuous risk visibility and measurable controls.

CTEM shifts you from reactive to proactive, from siloed tools to a continuous, integrated program.

Business Outcomes

Measurable value to the
Business

Reduce Risk Continuously

Continuously reduce exploitable exposures and breach likelihood.

Optimize Security Investments

Focus budget and resources on what matters most.

Improve Resilience & Trust

Strengthen cyber resilience and stakeholder confidence.

Demonstrate Compliance

Meet regulatory expectations with evidence and reporting.

CTEM
by the Numbers

Global benchmarks from organizations operating mature CTEM programs. Source-backed KPIs across remediation, exposure, attack surface, incidents and audit readiness.

MTTR Reduction
70%

Mean-time-to-remediate critical vulnerabilities drops 50-80%.

VECTRA AI / SAFEBREACH BENCHMARKS
Critical Exposure Reduction
84%

84% fewer false-urgency findings — focus on the ~2% of CVEs that actually reach crown-jewel assets.

GARTNER CTEM RESEARCH, 2025
Attack Surface Reduction
40%

30-40% more shadow/unknown assets discovered and decommissioned.

XM CYBER STATE OF EXPOSURE
Security Incident Reduction
65%

Organizations adopting CTEM are 3× less likely to suffer a material breach.

GARTNER, 2025
Audit Readiness Improvement
60%

50-70% reduction in audit prep time via continuous evidence collection.

ISACA / CUSTOMER BENCHMARKS
The CTEM Lifecycle

5 Stages

A continuous loop for Cyber Resilience

Continuous feedback & improvement across Scoping, Discovery, Prioritization, Validation and Mobilization.

STAGE 01

Scoping — Discover Your Attack Surface

What we do

  • Discover all assets, identities, and services across on-prem, cloud, SaaS and third parties.
  • Map business criticality and data classification.
  • Define scope, boundaries and monitoring strategy.

Key Outputs

Attack surface inventoryAsset classificationMonitoring baseline

Technologies

Attack Surface Management(ASM)External Asset DiscoveryCMDB & Asset InventoryIdentity & Access IntelligenceCloud Asset Discovery
01ScopingStage 01 - Scoping
STAGE 02

Discovery — Find & Assess Exposures

What we do

  • Continuously find weaknesses, misconfigurations, vulnerable services and risky dependencies.
  • Assess severity and exploitability in real time.
  • Enrich with threat intelligence.

Key Outputs

Exposure inventoryVulnerability findingsConfiguration issues

Technologies

Vulnerability ScannersConfiguration AssessmentSoftware Composition Analysis (SCA)Threat Intelligence FeedsExposure Intelligence Platforms
02DiscoveryStage 02 - Discovery
STAGE 03

Prioritization — Focus on What Matters Most

What we do

  • Correlate exposures with threat intelligence, asset criticality and business context.
  • Identify attack paths and quantify potential impact.
  • Prioritize based on real risk, not just CVSS.

Key Outputs

Risk-ranked exposure listAttack path insightsBusiness risk scores

Technologies

Risk-Based Vulnerability ManagementThreat Intelligence & Contextual RiskAttack Path AnalysisBusiness Context & Criticality MappingAI/ML Risk Scoring & Analytics
03PrioritizationStage 03 - Prioritization
STAGE 04

Validation — Prove & Measure Real Risk

What we do

  • Continuously validate whether prioritized exposures are truly exploitable.
  • Simulate real-world attacks to measure control effectiveness.
  • Quantify risk reduction over time.

Key Outputs

Verified exploitable risksControl effectiveness scoresRisk reduction metrics

Technologies

Breach & Attack Simulation (BAS)Penetration Testing (Manual & Automated)Red Team / Adversary EmulationExploit Validation ToolsSecurity Control Validation
04ValidationStage 04 - Validation
STAGE 05

Mobilization — Act, Remediate & Improve

What we do

  • Drive remediation with clear ownership, automated workflows, and accountability.
  • Track progress and validate fixes.
  • Continuously improve security posture and processes.

Key Outputs

Remediation planFix validationImproved posture

Technologies

Ticketing & Remediation WorkflowsSecurity Orchestration & Automation (SOAR)Patch ManagementContinuous Monitoring & DetectionMetrics, Reporting & Risk Governance
05MobilizationStage 05 - Mobilization
Attack Path Example

From Initial Access to Impact

External Exposure
(Open RDP)
Initial Access
(Brute Force)
Privilege Escalation
(Credential Theft)
Lateral Movement
(RDP/SMB)
Data Access
(File Server)
Impact
(Ransomware)

How CTEM Breaks the Chain!

Eliminates unnecessary external exposure
Validates credentials and access risks
Stops privilege escalation opportunities
Detects lateral movement paths
Protects sensitive data access
Validates controls and reduces impact
CTEM as a Service

Our Offerings

End-to-end CTEM capabilities — from program design to fully managed lifecycle.

CTEM Program Design & Advisory
Remediation as a Service
External Attack Surface Management
Continuous Validation (BAS / Red Team)
Continuous Vulnerability & Exposure Mgmt
Third-Party / Supply Chain Exposure Mgmt
Threat Intelligence & Risk Prioritization
CTEM Managed Service (Full Lifecycle)
Attack Path Analysis & Breach Simulation
Reporting & Board-Level Insights

Your trusted CTEM partner

CTEM Specialists

Deep expertise in exposure management, threat intelligence and validation.

Local Presence, Global Standards

Strong local team in Malaysia with global delivery capabilities.

Proven Methodology

Battle-tested framework aligned to NIST, MITRE and industry best practices.

Outcome Focused

200+ enterprises trust CogniShield for continuous threat exposure management.

Technology Agnostic

We bring the right technology mix to meet your unique business needs.

Trusted by Leading Organizations

Partner of choice for enterprises across sectors in Malaysia and ASEAN.
